title: VS MCP Bridge Blog Series: Part 3
description:
Async Work, Approval Flow, and UI Thread Safety. This post continues the developer ramp-up series for VS MCP Bridge and explains where async behavior matters in the current implementation, what must stay on the UI thread, and how approval flow stays predictable.
One small correction: the current slug field you showed, vs-mcp-bridge-blog-series-part, is too generic. It will make all posts look the same and will not identify Part 3 cleanly. I recommend using the numbered slug above.
author: AI Systems Author
